image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ozone depletion and global warming—two crises, but not the same.
Context visual: Ozone depletion refers to the thinning of the ozone layer, crucial for blocking harmful UV rays.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But climate change? That’s about rising temperatures and greenhouse gases.
Escalation visual: While ozone depletion is mainly caused by human-made chemicals, climate change stems from fossil fuels and deforestation
Evidence visual: The Montreal Protocol successfully reduced ozone-depleting substances, showing we can act.
Payoff visual: Understanding these issues lets us tackle them effectively, protecting our planet.
Cta visual: Curious for more environmental insights? Hit that follow button!
